context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements JavaScript server-side real-time transcription with manual audio chunking, including correct package usage, manual commit strategy for file-based audio, proper PCM format specification, chunk sizing, and event handling via RealtimeEvents.

checklist.name: Correct npm package
checklist.description: package.json lists '@elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js' as a dependency, NOT 'elevenlabs'

checklist.name: Realtime connect method
checklist.description: Uses client.speechToText.realtime.connect() for the streaming connection

checklist.name: Correct realtime model
checklist.description: Uses modelId: 'scribe_v2_realtime' (not 'scribe_v2' or other model names)

checklist.name: Manual commit used
checklist.description: Calls connection.commit() explicitly after sending audio (manual commit strategy, appropriate for file processing), does NOT configure VAD

checklist.name: PCM audio format
checklist.description: Specifies PCM audio format (e.g., AudioFormat.PCM_16000 or equivalent) in the connection configuration

checklist.name: Sample rate 16kHz
checklist.description: Uses sampleRate of 16000 in connection config or audio chunk messages

checklist.name: Chunk size ~32000
checklist.description: Uses a chunk size of approximately 32000 bytes (32000 or 32768) when splitting audio data

checklist.name: RealtimeEvents import
checklist.description: Imports RealtimeEvents from '@elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js' and uses it for event registration (e.g., connection.on(RealtimeEvents.COMMITTED_TRANSCRIPT, ...))

checklist.name: Timestamps requested
checklist.description: Passes includeTimestamps: true in the connection configuration

checklist.name: Base64 encoding
checklist.description: Encodes audio chunks to base64 before sending (e.g., chunk.toString('base64') or Buffer.from().toString('base64'))
